description: Counts registered passenger cars with Trafikskade accident-damage flag, with top brands. Use when user asks accident-flag counts or affected brands. Registry flag only, not full history.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningTrafikskade == true | STATS car_count = COUNT(*) BY brand = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword | SORT car_count DESC | LIMIT 20
